title: Fame vs flashdance workout
description:
Get ready to sweat it out with some serious 80s vibes in this Fame vs Flashdance workout showdown!

Join us for an exciting in-person workout event at the 3d Health & Fitness Gym - Oasis Academy Arena! Experience the energy and fun as we bring together the iconic styles of Fame and Flashdance in one dynamic fitness session.

Date & Time: July 6, 2026 at 7:30 PM (BST)

Don't miss this unique chance to get fit while celebrating the spirit of two legendary dance classics. See you there!

title: Best of Rock songs cardio dance workout
description:
Get your heart pumping and air guitar ready with a killer cardio dance session fueled by rock anthems!

Get ready to rock your heart out with the Best of Rock Songs Cardio Dance Workout! Join us for an energetic evening filled with pulsating beats and dance moves that will have you sweating and smiling. This in-person event at the 3d Health & Fitness Gym is the perfect way to combine your love of rock music with a fun cardio workout. Don’t forget your dancing shoes and your best air guitar skills!

First class with me? Get your first class for half the price. Just use Turnupemz promo code upon checkout to get 50% off.
